title: Between Horizons
description: An expanded world of Minecraft to explore and build in
body:
## Overview
Between Horizons is a mod-pack that aims to create a incredible world to explore, mine in, and or build in. Featuring an array of biome and world generation mods, and so much more. An adventure awaits you, find your way between the horizons!

## What's included?
🌎- Vast Immersive World: Explore a breath taking world created by putting Tectonic, Terralith, BOP, Geophilic, and OTBYG along with a series of structure mods and Immerive Weathering all together. A vast world unfolds before you  with hundreds of unique biomes and incredible continents to explore. 

🛠️- Tools & Weapons: Good ol' Tinkers offers the tried and tested way of creating epic tools and weapons, while Tetra offers a different take on crafting and upgrading yours tools while requiring you to delve into the depths beneath mountains to find ancient ruins. Choose your prefered style of tool craft and pave your way!

🌦️- Seasons: Serene Seaons will transform the world around you as you go through the four seasons, bringing different weather patterns and affecting how your crops grow and the fauna around you!

🏗️✨- Building & Decoration: Thousands of blocks from Dustrial Decor, Chipped, Chisled, Stoneworks, and many more mods give you a wide variety of blocks and decorations to create impressive builds! Go crazy!

⚙️- Optimizations: Mods like Embeddium, AI Improvements, Bad Optimizations, Entity Culling and several more do their best to help keep the modpack running as smooth as possible. Be sure though that you have a decent computer!



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- It is strongly recommend that you give this pack **AT LEAST 8GB's of RAM**. Lower clock speeds may encounter issues running at the min RAM.
- Using higher resolution texture packs and or shaders with this pack may impact performance. Performance issues if high res texture packs or shaders are out of our control and may entirely depend on your hardware and resource allocations

</details>




<details>
<summary>Known Issues</summary>
While the pack is stable at this time, there could be issues that have not been yet found. As any new issues are found that can-not be solved or are awaiting fixes from mod devs, they will be posted here. Please check back here if you encounter an issue to see if it has been posted.
</details>
